title: nervilia futago
intro: Nervilia futago, also known as the "ghost orchid," is a type of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nervilia futago include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. Nervilia futago can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal purposes.
